stemHtml: ATC says: "G-ABCD disregard CPDLC route clearance direct DASNI message, break, cleared direct ALKIS, rest of route unchanged." Why?

options.a: To correct the direct-to clearance, reissuing it to ALKIS.
options.b: To inform of complete CPDLC failure, reverting to voice.
options.c: To inform of a single-message failure, passing the new clearance to ALKIS.
options.d: To correct the clearance, reissuing it to DASNI.
